description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced JavaScript skills, focusing on the native `Date` class's complex API. It challenges developers to handle date formatting, localization, and time manipulation without relying on third-party libraries, using a direct and slightly humorous tone to engage learners.
Topics: Date object methods, Time manipulation, Date formatting, Localization, Common pitfalls in Date API
Audience: JavaScript developers seeking to deepen their understanding of native date handling, particularly those who may overuse third-party libraries.
